author: fab_10
content:
There should not be a big difference in the time needed to build a block with or w/o ILs, since already today 3-4s should be enough for a EL to build a block that consumes all the block gas limit.
So in the worst case, normal txs consume all the gas, then ILs are quickly tried and skipped since there is not space for them. The check that the block remaining gas is less that each IL tx gas limit should be negligible

author: fab_10
content: As a rule of thumb the payload identifier should be different if the attributes of the FcU change, including the ILs, but yes this is EL dependent
